allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $c=\(Invoke-WebRequest "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Thinstation/thinstation-ng/7.2-Stable/ts/build/build"\).Content; $lines=$c -split "`n"; $idx=\($lines | Select-String -Pattern 'isofs.ko.xz'\).LineNumber; Write-Output "isofs.ko.xz at line\(s\): $idx"; foreach\($i in $idx\){ Write-Output "----- around $i -----"; \($lines[\($i-20\)..\($i+20\)]\) -join "`n" })

PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $c=\(Invoke-WebRequest "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Thinstation/thinstation-ng/7.2-Stable/ts/build/build"\).Content; $lines=$c -split "`n"; $idx=\($lines | Select-String -Pattern 'for module in squashfs loop overlay'\).LineNumber; Write-Output "stub loop at line: $idx"; \($lines[\($idx-35\)..\($idx+20\)]\) -join "`n")

PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $c=\(Invoke-WebRequest "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Thinstation/thinstation-ng/7.2-Stable/ts/build/build"\).Content; $lines=$c -split "`n"; Write-Output "=== depmod sobre tmp-tree ==="; \($lines | Select-String -Pattern 'depmod' \); Write-Output "`n=== definicion copy_module \(cabecera\) ==="; $i=\($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^copy_module\\\(\\\)|^copy_module \\\(\\\)|copy_module\\\(\\\)'\).LineNumber; Write-Output "copy_module def at: $i"; if\($i\){ \($lines[\($i-1\)..\($i+25\)]\) -join "`n" })
